questionHtml:
Hydrogen and iodine react to form hydrogen iodide.

H2 (g) + I2 (g) ⇌ 2HI (g)

The following experimental data was obtained.

Deduce the order of reaction with respect to hydrogen.

meta.title: Deduce the order of reaction with respect to hydrogen.
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 2. How much, how fast and how far?
Reactivity 2.2—How fast? The rate of chemical change
Reactivity 2.2.9—Rate equations depend on the mechanism of the reaction and can only be determined experimentally. Deduce the rate equation for a reaction from experimental data.
